summary: Enthusiastic fan recollection of a rain‑soaked show with Jerry on stage left, but recording source and sound quality are unclear.
review: The lone reviewer is clearly excited, recalling seeing Jerry playing on the left side of the stage, Phil also positioned left, and mentions Brent and other band members grooving despite the rain. No concrete details about the audio fidelity or whether this is a soundboard or audience capture are provided, leaving the recording quality indeterminate.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one highly positive (5‑star) review; enthusiasm suggests a good performance, but lack of technical detail prevents a higher confidence rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer does not comment on sound clarity, mix, or source type; only mentions visual/performance aspects.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No information provided about set structure or pacing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Noted playing on the left side of the stage and generating excitement.
band_member_comments.Phil: Mentioned as also being on the left side during the show.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent is referenced as part of the grooving band.
